summary: Comprehensive testing of Remember Me feature and REAL AI/CV image analysis using GPT-5.2 Vision. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend login with Remember Me working correctly. AI image analysis correctly detects occupancy, cleanliness, and lighting conditions.

minor.issue: Fixed during testing - Legacy documents without 'id' field were causing empty responses. Added filter to only fetch analyses with 'id' field.

issues: Minor: HTML validation warning about <span> inside <tbody> - hydration error warning in console, but doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: Login without Remember Me uses default 24hr token expiry
Backend: Login with Remember Me extends token to 30 days
Backend: Login defaults to 24hr when remember_me not provided
Backend: Admin login with Remember Me works correctly
Backend: AI analysis correctly detects empty classroom (0 occupancy)
Backend: AI analysis correctly detects students in lecture hall (72-79 detected)
Backend: AI returns meaningful observations about room conditions
Backend: Analysis data persisted to database and retrievable
Backend: Cleanliness score always within 0-100 range
Backend: Lighting condition returns valid enum values (Poor/Fair/Good/Excellent)
Backend: Analyze endpoint accessible without authentication (current behavior)
Backend: Batch analysis of multiple rooms works correctly
Frontend: Remember Me checkbox present with data-testid='login-remember-checkbox'
Frontend: Remember Me label shows '30 days'
Frontend: Login with Remember Me redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Token stored in localStorage after login
Frontend: Analyze page has room name input, file upload, and analyze button
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed /api/analyses endpoint to filter for documents with 'id' field - legacy seeded data without 'id' was causing query to return 0 results
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed get_analyses to filter by id: {$exists: true}
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed analyses created during backend testing for AI analysis verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Remember Me feature and Real AI/CV analysis fully tested. JWT token expiry correctly set to 24hr default or 30 days with Remember Me. GPT-5.2 Vision AI correctly analyzes classroom images - detecting occupancy (0 for empty, 60-80 for lecture halls), cleanliness scores (0-100), and lighting conditions (Poor/Fair/Good/Excellent). /api/analyses endpoint fixed to filter legacy data without 'id' field.

mocked_apis.REAL: AI/CV classroom image analysis uses GPT-5.2 Vision - NOT MOCKED
mocked_apis.note: AI analysis is REAL - correctly counts people, scores cleanliness, assesses lighting from actual images

ai_analysis_verification.empty_classroom_test: Correctly detected 0 occupancy, 82-88% cleanliness, Good lighting
ai_analysis_verification.lecture_hall_test: Correctly detected 72-79 students, 90-92% cleanliness, Good/Excellent lighting
ai_analysis_verification.observations: AI provides detailed, meaningful observations about room conditions including furniture, cleanliness, and lighting assessment
